source_name: Clean Energy Regulator - Safeguard Mechanism dataset

fields.scope: Safeguard Mechanism applies to facilities emitting >100,000 t CO2-e/year. Reformed from 1 July 2023 with declining baselines and ACCU surrender obligations.
fields.primary_source_document: Clean Energy Regulator Safeguard Mechanism reported emissions dataset (annual, published in Q1 of the following financial year).
fields.keying_plan: Key the count of covered facilities, aggregate baseline, aggregate reported emissions, count of above-baseline facilities, ACCU surrender total. Cross-reference the safeguard outcomes annual report.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed Safeguard Mechanism aggregates. Approximately 215 facilities covered as at the 2023-24 reform; coverage spans LNG, mining, manufacturing, aviation. The mechanism is the main pricing instrument for industrial emissions in Australia.
citation: Clean Energy Regulator, Safeguard Mechanism reported emissions dataset.
